function: () => { const fi = document.getElementById('modalRefUpload'); const cs = getComputedStyle(fi); const r = fi.getBoundingClientRect(); return { display: cs.display, visibility: cs.visibility, opacity: cs.opacity, position: cs.position, width: cs.width, height: cs.height, offsetParent: fi.offsetParent ? fi.offsetParent.tagName : 'NULL', rect: { x: r.x, y: r.y, w: r.width, h: r.height }, parentTag: fi.parentElement.tagName, parentDisplay: getComputedStyle(fi.parentElement).display }; }
